item.title: Key takeaways from a docu on the manosphere, so we can save ourselves our sanity
item.description:
Document Inside the Manosphere reported on by Adam Saraswati Rawlings, for The New Feminist magazine
Crufts (capital "C") is a dog show.
Only perverts shriek that loudly about porn and sharing pornography apps with their family members. Trans porn consumption is also very high in red areas.
They profit off of loneliness.
Freud was right AGAIN. Every time it's an obvious daddy issue, Occams razor dictates that it's probably certainly just a daddy issue.
The conspiratorial mindedness pipeline all flows to antisemitic racism.
They live on the pillowy comfort of cognitive bias confirmation by echo chambers.
Ideological acrophily interacts with audience capture to gravitate more extreme claims and behavior to draw attention to views more radical than their average audience member.
When in doubt, follow the money. Super simple rule from analyzing if a group is a cult. If the money only flows to one person in one direction, it's probably financially abusive.
All credit to The New Feminist and Adam Saraswati Rawlings
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Trump's horrific advice may have just gotten people killed
item.description: BREAKING: Trump's "advice" to oil tankers: "Show some guts, sail through Hormuz anyway." Iran's response: Tanker decimated, fire raging in the Persian Gulf. This isn't leadership — it's playing with lives for ego points. How many more have to die? #TrumpIrresponsible #HormuzDisaster #IranWar #WakeUpAmerica Quote-tweet your thoughts — follow for unfiltered truth
item.dc:creator: MEOWnews

item.title: It's less impressive knowing I was using an 8 week program though...
item.description: So many years ago I purchased an app called Zombies Run 5k at the recommendation of my older sister. Zombies Run 5k is an 8 week program that each week is 3 days. It tells the story about you being found outside the Abel compound where you're recruited to become a runner, which is a person that runs into the surrounding area to find supplies, but before you officially become one, you have to train to increase your stamina. Unfortunately in all the time owning it ive never finished it. I'd pick it up, get about 3-4 weeks into the program, then stop. Pick it back up, rinse and repeat. But for the first time, I'm on week 8. Friday is my very last one and it's supposed to be my first 5k. So today on day 2 of week 8, it had you do 3 sets of runs, with 2 being 10 minutes straight and one being 5 minutes, with some 5 minute walks in-between to cool off a bit. The very first run while still being fresh, for the first time ever I jogged for just shy of 10 minutes straight without stopping and I'm fucking proud of myself. Every week as I continue my fitness journey as a middle aged dude, something has changed in me mentally as everytime I've gone down this path, I haven't been able to make it stick for more than a few months. TLDR: I'm making progress in my workouts.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @AnthonyChristopherArt gave us a peek into his sketchbook. Absolutely fantastic. Check out their posts for more awesomeness.
27 Man Tax: Chris Pratt
“The need for mystery is greater than the need for an answer.” - Ken Kesey So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me

item.title: How AIPAC and AI buy votes in Illinois
item.description:
#IL-09 We all know and love Kat Abughazaleh. She has two corrupt enemies.
#IL-09 Daniel Biss is at the moment 4 points ahead of Kat. :/ Taking pro-Israel money but still lying about it.
Laura Fine, openly taking AIPAC and AI Money.
AIPAC has now spent over $15 million in four Chicago House races. IL-02: $3,243,974.70 IL-07: $3,204,623.23 IL-08: $3,777,239.68 IL-09: $5,404,175.65 They know the AIPAC name is toxic, so they're using front groups like "Elect Chicago Women" and "Affordable Chicago Now!" Who are the other progressives in IL?
#IL02 This is Illinois state senator Robert Peters. Endorsed by AOC and Bernie! https://www.robertpetersforcongress.com/
Robert Peters runs against Donna Miller for IL-02
#IL07 This is Kina Collins https://www.kinacollinsil.com/ But IL07 has two dope candidates, I posted about Anabel Mendoza ( https://www.anabelforcongress.com/ ) earlier. Have a look: https://imgur.com/gallery/primary-them-all-6iPXJbR
Both are running against the corrupt Melissa Conyears-Ervin.
#IL08 Junaid Ahmed, endorsed by Bernie and AOC, is the most known progressive candidate after Kat. https://junaidforus.com/
Not only AIPAC, this cunt takes much money from AI, too.

item.title: A US-owned oil tanker is on fire. It was hit by Iranian drone speedboats off the Iraqi port of Umm Qasr.
item.description: Two tankers were hit, the US-owned "Safesea Vishnu" and the Greek-owned "Zefyros." At least one crewmember, ship and nationality unknown, is dead. 38 more have been pulled from the water by SAR boats. The two ships had a cargo of naphtha and petroleum condensates, both highly flammable, and used as feedstocs for plastic and gasoline. https://www.timesnownews.com/world/middle-east/iran-hits-us-owned-oil-tanker-safesea-vishnu-set-on-fire-in-persian-gulf-near-basrah-iraq-article-153814102
item.dc:creator: IDontKnowWhatToDoAnymoreAndImTired

item.title: Red flags should be going off in everyone's minds right now.
item.description: Unless you have an IQ of 1, you can all see what's coming. You can see though all their lies and know exactly what's about to happen on our own home soil. And it won't be from IRAN or any other Middle East nation. It's going to be done by our own president, GOP members, their enablers and supporters. We need to prepare ourselves and be vigilant. Avoid important or historic areas, or anywhere large crowds gather daily. I have the feeling they're going to commit this act at a place of historic significance to maximize public outrage. Kiddie diddler in chief, all his GOP enablers, and many of the rich and powerful are willing to do ANYYHING to stay in power and out of prison. And you should all be as terrified as I am. This sucks.
item.dc:creator: YeastInfectedWhiskerBiscuit

item.title: Probiotics for the win!
item.description:
I’ve been texting with the humane society’s CEO, Spencer (@AlabamaAnimalRescuer), about my pregnant foster cat, Bobbie. I’m a little worried about her because I assume she had terrible nutrition during the early stages of her pregnancy AND she was attacked by a dog, and I don’t know what kind of effect that has had on her kittens.
He gave me the amazing idea to sprinkle some probiotics on her wet food.
She hasn’t let me leave the kitten room for the last two days without following me and attacking me. But she is ALL ABOUT these probiotics. I can actually sneak out without claws and teeth!!
CRAP. I forgot my drink in my haste to leave, but mama Bobbie is still going AT her food. Thank you, Spencer!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.dc:creator: SweepTheLeg31

item.title: GovBrief Today #405
item.description: The U.S. military killed 168 children because nobody updated the map. The military's coordinates were 13 years old. The building had become a school a decade ago, and satellite imagery from three months ago showed children playing there. Pentagon investigators confirmed the findings Wednesday. Trump said "I don't know about that." He also said there's practically nothing left to target, and the war ends whenever he decides. Trump has also long said he wants homeless people off the streets and into institutions. On Wednesday, VA attorneys were given authority to initiate involuntary proceedings to strip homeless veterans of their legal rights and institutionalize them. The government that spent $11.3 billion in six days on this war has decided that's what it owes the people it sent to fight. Demand Congress hold hearings on the intelligence failures that killed those children, and on what this country does to veterans once the wars are over. We've emailed 6,500+ stories over 405 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/ca-drone-iran [2] https://go.govbrief.today/oil-surges [3] https://go.govbrief.today/school-intel [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar11 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/hawley-mifepristone [6] https://go.govbrief.today/va-guardianship [7] https://go.govbrief.today/kahn-epstein [8] https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-lutnick-depo [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-kentucky-cinc [10] https://go.govbrief.today/college-race-data [11] https://go.govbrief.today/md-dems-full [12] https://go.govbrief.today/reporter-device-appeal [13] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-photos [14] https://go.govbrief.today/consumer-refunds [15] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-firms-reversal [16] https://go.govbrief.today/police-anxiety [17] https://go.govbrief.today/camp-montana-open [18] https://go.govbrief.today/resource-surveillance [19] https://go.govbrief.today/leavenworth-center [20] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-crash [21] https://go.govbrief.today/ssa-telework-order [22] https://go.govbrief.today/ssa-investigation [23] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-muslim-schools [24] https://go.govbrief.today/md-center-halt Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com *Thank you for the notes -- this didn't go through a couple of hours ago*
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
